Select tool groups

Built-in and always-on tools stay enabled. Toggle MCP / extension groups to change how many tool definitions are in context.

Select model

Only showing models with configured API keys (see README). Type to filter, click a row or press Enter to apply.

Select skills

Select agents

Enable/disable agent personas in the catalog. Active agents are included in the system prompt context.
